stimulus: The Pacific Crest Trail is a long hiking route running through California, Oregon, and Washington. A large portion of the trail crosses pristine forests and high-altitude meadows. In order to ______blank these natural areas, the National Park Service has placed strict limits on logging and development along the trail.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is correct because "safeguard" means to protect from harm, which fits the context of limiting logging and development. Choice B is incorrect because renting natural areas doesn’t fit. Choice C is incorrect because decorating wilderness isn’t the goal. Choice D is incorrect because shortening the natural areas is illogical.
